# Keevan Store — Creator Commerce for East Africa
> Sell e-books, PDFs, guides, templates, and digital products online. East African creators keep 90% of every sale. Pesapal payments. Instant delivery. No monthly fees.

## Essential pages
- [Homepage](https://keevanstore.in) — Overview of the platform, features, and how it works
- [About](https://keevanstore.in/about) — What Keevan Store is and who it serves
- [Features](https://keevanstore.in/features) — Full feature list for creators
- [Pricing](https://keevanstore.in/pricing) — 10% platform commission, no monthly fees
- [FAQ](https://keevanstore.in/faq) — Frequently asked questions about buying and selling

## For creators
- [Sign up](https://keevanstore.in/signup) — Create a free creator account
- [Login](https://keevanstore.in/login) — Creator and admin login
- [Pricing](https://keevanstore.in/pricing) — Commission rates, minimum withdrawals
- [Creator dashboard overview](https://keevanstore.in/creator/dashboard) — Manage your store, products, and earnings

## For buyers
- [Buyer dashboard](https://keevanstore.in/buyer/dashboard) — View purchased products and downloads
- [Request a refund](https://keevanstore.in/request-refund) — Look up orders and request refunds
- [Order lookup](https://keevanstore.in/order/lookup) — Find your purchases by email

## Products and stores
- [Product detail page](https://keevanstore.in/product/[slug]) — Each product has a dedicated SEO-optimized page with structured data and Open Graph tags
- [Store page](https://keevanstore.in/store/[handle]) — Every creator gets a branded storefront with all their products
- [Checkout](https://keevanstore.in/checkout/[slug]) — Secure checkout via Pesapal (mobile money, card, bank transfer)

## Policies
- [Terms of Service](https://keevanstore.in/terms)
- [Privacy Policy](https://keevanstore.in/privacy)
- [Refund Policy](https://keevanstore.in/refund-policy)

## Platform documentation
- [Product requirements](https://keevanstore.in/docs/prd) — Full PRD with business rules
- [API specification](https://keevanstore.in/docs/api-specification) — API endpoints and usage
- [System architecture](https://keevanstore.in/docs/system-architecture) — Technical architecture overview

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +256768345905
- Support page: https://keevanstore.in/contact

## Quick facts
- Platform: Creator commerce for digital products
- Regions served: Uganda, Kenya, Tanzania, Rwanda
- Supported currencies: UGX, KES, TZS, RWF, USD
- Fees: 10% commission per sale (no monthly fees)
- Payment gateway: Pesapal (mobile money, card, bank transfer)
- File formats: PDF, EPUB, MOBI, ZIP (up to 4 MB)
- Min withdrawal: 50,000 UGX (varies by currency)
- Founded: 2025
- Tech stack: Next.js, Supabase, Pesapal, Vercel
